'''''Esorp''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that transferred [[Space mine/Legends|mines]] to the [[Dellalt system/Legends|Dellalt system]], preparing the [[Operation Strike Fear]]. It was destroyed by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] and [[Hamo Blastwell]] during the defection of ''[[Bixby]]''.

==Behind the scenes==
The name is an anagram of ''Prose'', going with the other freighter named ''[[Orcim]]''. All together it reads ''Microprose''.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
